meanings.definition: the act of moving a newly built vessel into the water for the first time
the act of beginning something new
examples: they looked forward to the debut of their new product line

meanings.definition: the act of propelling with force

examples: She set up a literacy program

meanings.definition: launch for the first time; launch on a maiden voyage

examples: He launched into a long diatribe
She plunged into a dangerous adventure
Her actions set in motion a complicated judicial process
